content:
Short title and application
1. (1) This Act may be cited as the Racing Club (Public Sweepstakes)
Act 1965.
(2) This Act shall apply throughout Malaysia.
Racing Clubs may promote public sweepstakes

Racing Clubs may promote public sweepstakes
2. (1) A racing club established in Malaysia may, after the
commencement of this Act, promote a sweeptake in which any
person (including a person not being a member of the club) may
take part; and the *Betting Ordinance 1953 [Ord. 47 of 1953],
shall not apply to any sweepstake so promoted.
(2) In this section—
“racing club” means a racing club which is a member of the
Malayan Racing Association or a successor thereof; and
“sweepstakes” means any sweepstake promoted on the result
of a horse race.

of a horse race.
3. (Omitted).
*NOTE—The Betting Ordinance 1953 [Ord. 47 of 1953] has been revised as the Betting Act 1953
[Act 495].
